sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Decline in headline inflation good news, but core inflation edging up: CRISIL - ETCFO
feed.summary: CRISIL reports India's headline inflation dropped to 2.8 percent in May 2025. This decline is primarily due to lower food inflation. However, core inflation, excluding food and fuel, is slightly increasing. CRISIL suggests rising core inflation could pressure headline inflation.
